_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_prometheus.prometheus_query with query='up == 0', captured live 2026-05-13 from the dev environment (k3s prod, monitoring-stack/prometheus-55b9bd979c-fxkw8). The python tool (server.py prometheus_query) returns a FORMATTED MULTI-LINE TEXT STRING that begins with the header 'Query: ... / Result Type: vector / Results: N' and then emits one line per result containing a JSON-stringified metric label dict followed by `: <value>`. FastMCP wraps the string return as content[{type:'text', text: <string>}]. The mcp-proxy passes through 2 layers of result unwrap (proxy.result → jsonrpc.result) and surfaces { content: [...], isError: false }. The mcp_tool node's content-block joiner (WorkflowExecutionEngine.ts) collapses content[].text into a single `content` string. This fixture captures THREE down targets so the analyze transform's parse + extract + slice exercise: 1 minio (app='minio'), 1 postgresql (app_kubernetes_io_name='postgresql'), 1 redis-master. All in namespace openagentic. These are REAL down targets in the cluster as of 2026-05-13.

content.text:
Query: up == 0
Result Type: vector
Results: 3

  {"__name__": "up", "app_kubernetes_io_component": "primary", "app_kubernetes_io_instance": "pgvector", "app_kubernetes_io_managed_by": "Helm", "app_kubernetes_io_name": "postgresql", "app_kubernetes_io_version": "18.3.0", "apps_kubernetes_io_pod_index": "0", "controller_revision_hash": "postgresql-68b6449b99", "helm_sh_chart": "postgresql-18.6.4", "instance": "10.42.7.133:9187", "job": "kubernetes-pods", "kubernetes_namespace": "openagentic", "kubernetes_pod_name": "postgresql-0", "namespace": "openagentic", "statefulset_kubernetes_io_pod_name": "postgresql-0"}: 0
